content: Remote OK Senior Full stack React Developer Lemon.io <p>Are you a talented Senior Developer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers.</li><li>No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates â let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.</li><li>We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.</li><li>Choose a schedule that works best for you. We also have some backend positions; the full list is included below as well.</p><h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior React &amp; Python Position:</strong></h3><ul><li>4+ years of software development experience</li></ul><p><strong>Commercial experience:</strong></p><ul><li>React.js 3+ years and Python 3+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js 2+ years and Python 5+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js 5+ years and Python 2+ years</li><li>Experience with AWS, GCP, or Azure is required</li></ul><hr /><h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior Python Position:</strong></h3><ul><li>5+ years of software development experience</li><li>5+ years of commercial experience with Python</li><li>3+ years of commercial experience with Flask</li></ul><hr /><h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior Golang &amp; React Position:</strong></h3><ul><li>4+ years of software development experience</li><li>React.js 3+ years and Golang 3+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js 2+ years and Golang 5+ years <strong>OR</strong> React.js 5+ years and Golang 2+ years</li></ul><h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior Golang Position:</strong></h3><ul><li>5+ years of software development experience</li><li>5+ years of commercial experience with Golang</li></ul><hr /><h3><strong>Requirements for the Senior Node &amp; React Position:</strong></h3><ul><li>5+ years of software development experience</li></ul><p><strong>Commercial experience:</strong></p><ul><li>React.js: 3+ years, Node.js: 5+ years, and Next.js: 2+ years</li></ul><p><strong>OR</strong></p><p>React.js: 5+ years, Node.js: 3+ years, and Next.js: 2+ years</p><ul><li>Expertise in TypeScript, Supabase and AWS is a must.</li></ul><p><strong>Other requirements:</strong></p><ul><li>Strong technical skills: as a Senior Developer, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture.</li><li>Clear and effective communication in English â advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.</li><li>Strong self-organizational skills â ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.</li><li>Reliability â we want to trust you and expect that you wonât let us and the client down.</li><li>Adaptability and Flexibility â the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.</li></ul><p>Sounds good for you? Apply now and join the <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=remoteok&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_react_node/golang/python_apr_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> community!</p><p><strong>NOT YOUR TECH STACK?</strong></p><p>We have multiple projects available for Senior Developers. If you have 4+ years of commercial software development experience and are proficient in any of the following areas: React &amp; Ruby, PHP &amp; Angular, PHP &amp; Vue, Vue &amp; Node.js, React &amp; .NET, Android &amp; iOS, Angular &amp; .NET, Angular &amp; Node.js, Vue &amp; .NET, Python &amp; Vue, MLOps, React &amp; Java, Data Science, Blockchain (Web3/Solidity/Solana), Symfony &amp; React, Symfony &amp; Vue, Symfony &amp; Angular, Symfony &amp; JavaScript &amp; Next.js &amp; TypeScript, Data Analysis, React &amp; PHP, Data Engineering, AI Engineering, Data Annotation, DevOps, Svelte &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Node, Svelte &amp; TypeScript, Rust, Shopify &amp; JavaScript, Vue &amp; Nuxt, Python &amp; Node, Angular &amp; TypeScript, Ruby &amp; Ruby on Rails, React Native &amp; Ruby, React Native &amp; Python, PHP &amp; Laravel, .NET &amp; C#, Java &amp; Spring, Unreal Engine &amp; C++, Python &amp; LLM, Unity, Machine Learning Engineering â weâd be happy to connect and match you with a suitable project.</p><p><strong>If your experience matches our requirements, be ready for the next steps:</strong></p><ul><li>VideoAsk â watch a short video about our startup, up to 10 minutes</li><li>Complete your profile on our website</li><li>30-minute screening call</li><li>Technical interview</li><li>Feedback</li><li>Magic Box (we are looking for the best project for you).</li></ul><p>We do not provide visa assistance, and our cooperation model does not include the benefits typically offered with direct hire.</p><p>P.S. <strong>We work with developers from 71+ countries in different regions:</strong> Europe, LATAM, the U.S (if you are an owner of W-9 ben form), Canada, Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, Philippines, Indonesia), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea), and the the UK. However, we have some exceptions.</p><p><strong>At the moment, we donât have a legal basis to accept applicants from the following countries:</strong></p><ul><li>European: Hungary, Iceland, Liechtenstein, Kosovo, Belarus, Russia, and Serbia.</li><li>Latin America: Cuba and Nicaragua</li><li>Most Asian countries and Africa.</li></ul><p>We expand and shorten the list of exemptions regularly.</p><p></p> javascript, react, node 2026-04-27T15:46:26+00:00 1131339 https://remoteO
